caption:
❗️⚠️ FLEUR DE MIRAVAL ⚠️❗️
Going undercover at Maison Pierre Péters in Le Mesnil-sur-Oger to taste one of Champagne’s best-kept secrets... 🤫

Everyone knows Brad Pitt’s Provence rosé 🍷
But did you know that to create this incredible champagne, the actor - already partnered with the Perrin family for Miraval - reached out to Rodolphe Péters, one of the absolute legends of Le Mesnil-sur-Oger 🍾❓

For 5 years, they worked completely under the radar. From that secret pact came @fleurdemiraval , stamped with the famous PPP initials : Pitt, Perrin, Péters. 
Three different worlds, engraved right on the bottle 🍾

This wild multi-vintage project relies on a unique blending process (featuring 75% reserve wines in total) : 
1️⃣ 50% Perpetual Reserve (Chardonnay Grand Cru)
2️⃣ 25% Remise en cercle (Blanc de Blancs)
3️⃣ 25% Fresh Infused Rosé (Pinot Noir)

And now, the family has grown 🥂 
Say hello to the new newcomer : Petite Fleur 🍾
Think of it as the cooler, younger sibling—a bit more accessible, focusing on a vibrant, airy, and ultra-fresh style, while keeping that signature chalky elegance 🌸

After this cellar masterclass, a stop at @royalchampagne was mandatory to uncork the mythical “Réserve Oubliée” over a stunning lunch 🤩

Did you know the crazy story behind this bottle❓
.
.
#bradpitt #miraval #champagne #winetourism #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ PARTAGES ⚠️❗️
Tonight we’re keeping it simple to kick off the weekend - a great bottle of wine from South of France with some greasy pizza 🤤
Discovery of the day : this delicious red wine from Languedoc with a name that perfectly captures the wine vibe 🍷
@alteroeno 
Partages 📆2023
Vin de France
📍Tressan
🍇 Grapes : Carignan and Mourvèdre❗️
👁️ Bright ruby red color with purple highlights❗️
👃 Fresh and rich nose. Aromas of black fruits, ripe red fruits, cassis, cherry, blackberries, strawberries, chocolate, caramel and garrigue with notes of sweet spices❗️
👅 Fruity and rich in the mouth. Well-structured, round, dense, ample, silky, elegant and fine with polished tannins on the palate. Flavors of ripe red fruits, candied fruits, candied blueberry, ripe strawberries, cacao, licorice and spices with a touch of Mediterranean herbs. Such a long and spicy finish❗️
A beautiful cuvée to share with friends… or not 😁😂‼️
.
.
#redwine #pizza #winepairing #bruxelles #languedoc

❗️⚠️ PROVENCE ⚠️❗️
With the weather being so unpredictable lately, you’ve gotta stay on your toes and not get caught off guard❗️
It was super hot, then boom—a gorgeous Provence white wine, but now it’s chilly again, so bam—a massive baked Camembert with bacon 🔥
That’s how you make great pairings 😁😁
@domainelacourtade 📆2025
AOP Côtes de Provence
📍Porquerolles
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Rolle❗️
👁️ Fruity and rich nose. Aromas of yellow fruits, citrus, peach, passion fruit, white flowers, vanilla, butter and grilled bread with toasted notes❗️
👅 Frank attack, fruity and rich in the mouth. Well-structured, ample, round, fat, lively, fine and complex with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of ripe yellow fruits, stone fruits, citrus, grapefruit, vanilla, brioche and sweet spices with a saline touch. Long finish on notes of garrigue❗️
It must taste even better right there 🤩‼️
.
.
#provence #foodlover #camembert #bacon #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ DOUBLE POUR ⚠️❗️
For this 7th episode, we’re staying in France once again with these two hidden gems 🍷One to show that Bordeaux isn’t just about reds or sweet wines, and the other to highlight another underrated appellation 🔥

▶️ Vignes de Compostelle 📆2024 - Château Martet
▶️ Les Bambins 📆2024 - Clos des Augustins 

Your turn to test 🍾
.
.
#gems #wineselection #bordeaux #picsaintloup #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ WEDNESDAY BOOST ⚠️❗️
We popped open the rosé to cool down, and brought out the chicken & fries so we wouldn’t freeze either 😎
Tasting of the day : A superb rosé you can drink summer or winter, with or without food, a true chameleon 🤩
@chateausaintmaur 
L’Excellence 📆2025
Cru Classé
📍Cogolin
Grapes 🍇 : Grenache, Syrah, Cinsault, Rolle, Mourvèdre and Cabernet Sauvignon❗️
👁️ Pale rosé color with salmon highlights❗️
👃 Expressive and rich nose. Aromas of citrus, grapefruit, pomelo, red fruits, raspberries, peach, mango, vanilla, butter and pepper with floral notes❗️
👅 Frank attack, fresh and fruity in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, rich, complex, elegant, silky and round with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of citrus, grapefruit, apricot, cranberry, peach stone fruits, sweet spices and violet with light toasted notes. Long finale on citrus❗️
The bottle was way too small 😅🤩‼️
.
.
#provence #rosé #chicken #frenchfries #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ DOUBLE POUR ⚠️❗️
Today, for the 5th episode of bottles under €20, I’m bringing you another killer duo 🔥
On one side, a pretty crazy grape variety, and on the other, a seriously underrated appellation 🤩
Thanks @lapartdesangesverneuil for these delicious discoveries 🍷

▶️ Anjou - Chenin 📆2023 Terroirs de Schistes - Domaine des Hauts Perrays 🇫🇷 
▶️ Ainsi Soit-Il 📆2010 - Château Montdoyen 🇫🇷
Who’s up for two glasses 😁❓
.
.
#sundaymood #anjou #winestyle #gems #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ CHAMBOLLE-MUSIGNY ⚠️❗️
Well, it’s a well-known fact that I’m terrific at forgetting my bottles in the cellar 😅
So when someone pulls out this kind of gem that actually had the time to age beautifully, I only have on thing to say : THANK YOU 🤩
Tasting of the day : this amazing red wine from Côte de Nuits in an atypical vintage 🍷
Domaine Modot Père et Fils
1er cru Les Charmes 📆2003
📍Chambolle-Musigny
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Pinot Noir❗️
👁️ Bright ruby red color with tuiled reflections❗️
👃 Fresh and complex nose. Aromas of red fruits, strawberries, candied raspberries, prune, dried fig, mushroom, forest floor, undergrowth leather and licorice with peppery notes❗️
👅 Fresh and fruity in the mouth. Well-structured, ample, supple, elegant, rich, silky and round with melted tannins on the palate. Flavors of ripe red fruits, redcurrant, black cherry, kirsch, cacao, leather, cinnamon, truffles, vanilla and black pepper with okay notes. Long finish on kirsch❗️
This plonk was just incredible‼️
.
.
#burgundy #pinotnoir #cotedenuits #winetime #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ DOUBLE POUR ⚠️❗️
Today is the 4th episode of ‘Sunday Duo’🔥
While we wait for summer, we’re heading to the South and the deep South of France with these two flavor bombs 🤩 :
.
▶️ Mon P’tit Pithon 📆2024 - Domaine Olivier Pithon
▶️ Les Escures 📆2024 - Mas Del Périé
.
Enjoy your wine Sunday my wine lovers 🍷
.
.
#france #sundaymood #cotescatalanes #cahors #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ PROVENCE POWER ⚠️❗️
What do you think: does the rosé bring out the sun, or does the sun bring out the rosé❓
You have 4 hours ✍️🍷
Tasting of the day : this delicious rosé from Provence served with a quick little dish in sauce🤩
@chateau_la_calisse 📆 2025
AOP Coteaux Varois en Provence
📍Pontevès
Grapes 🍇 : Grenache and Syrah❗️
👁️ Very pale and crystalline pink color❗️
👃 Fresh and fruity nose. Aromas of red fruits, redcurrant, cranberries, citrus, pear, violet, acacia and elderflower with floral notes❗️
👅 Fresh and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, supple, round, fruity, precise and fine with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of red fruits, raspberries, cherry, citrus, grapefruit, white peach, hawthorn blossom and violet with a peppery touch. Long finale on red fruits❗️
I can confirm it’s the rosé that brings the sunshine‼️
.
.
#provence #rosé #wineandfood #coteauxvarois #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ PINOT NOIR ⚠️❗️
Oregon is famous for its Pinot Noirs, Burgundy too… Coincidence❓I don’t think so 😁😁
The Evenstad family, already famous for their Pinot Noirs in Oregon, just landed in Burgundy 🍷
Worldwide wine conspiracy or pure genius 🧐😁❓
In case of doubt, I drunk it all 😁
Tasting of the day : this really nice red burgundy from Santenay with a roast pork 🤩
@domaine_evenstad 
Bourgogne Côte d’Or 📅2023
📍Santenay
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Pinot Noir❗️
👁️ Bright ruby red color❗️
👃 Fruity and rich nose. Aromas of red fruits, raspberries, cherry, red berries, blueberries, plum, cacao, mushrooms and sweet spices with floral notes❗️
👅 Rich and fruity in the mouth. Well-structured, supple, round, elegant, silky and fresh with fine tannins on the palate. Flavors of red fruits, black fruits, cranberry, white pepper, leather, tobacco and undergrowth. Such a long finish on sour cherry❗️
No doubt, a Burgundy just the way we like it 🍷
.
.
#pinotnoir #oregon #burgundy #côtedor #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ PLANT-BASED CUISINE ⚠️❗️
If anyone had told me I’d visit a vegan restaurant of my own free will, I would’ve shouted ‘kidnapping’ 😂 
But the good kind - like being held hostage in a wine cellar 😎
Every trip back to Paris is a chance to test new spots, and honestly, this one was a culinary slap in the face @vivide_paris ❗️
Beyond the ‘Vegan’ label, you can tell the team is brainstorming some wild, out-of-the-box ideas 🤩 Hats off to the artists 🔥🔥
Special shout-out to the pairing of the Savagnin ouillé and braised endives ❗️ 
Absolutely nailed it 🔥🔥🔥
And as a bonus : only wines I’d never tasted before 🍷
.
.
#wineparis #restaurant #wine #winepairing #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ LUNCH X TASTING ⚠️❗️
Lunch with @magali.motyka to discover a new gem is already a delight 😁
But having a wine tasting break out at the table right next to us… That’s where the magic happens🍷
.
It was the ultimate opportunity for some truly sophisticated pairings🔥
This is the place to be @bistrotlepetitchamperret - the food is exceptional, and that authentic homemade touch is everything🤩
What else⁉️
Cheers to the good life 🍷🍾
.
.
#paris #wineandfood #pairing #winetasting #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ SENSORY JOURNEY TO CHILE ⚠️❗️
Another country I still have so much to learn about. Spotted this bottle earlier today and couldn’t leave without it 😁
Discovery of the day : this delicious Chardonnay from Chile paired with my Comte aged 30 months and a big piece of salmon 🔥
What was the last Chilean wine you tried❓
@vinosmontes 
Montes Alpha Chardonnay 📅2019
📍D.O Aconcagua Costa
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Chardonnay❗️
👁️ Pale yellow gold color with green highlights❗️
👃 Rich and fruity nose. Aromas of exotic fruits, stone fruits, citrus, pineapple, pear, mango, almond, grilled bread and butter with notes of spices❗️
👅 Fresh and fruity in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, elegant, round and rich with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of ripe yellow fruits, tropical fruits, lemon cream, honey, anise and hazelnut with a touch of vanilla. Long finish on tropical fruits❗️
A beautiful introduction to conquering the wines of Chile‼️
.
.
#chile #chardonnay #aconcagua #chileanwine #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ ROMANIAN SUNDAY ⚠️❗️
Today was supposed to be just homemade burgers and a glass of wine, but since the wine was actually quite nice, I had to post it (and finish it) 😂
Pairing of the day : this nice Romanian discovery with tasty burgers 🔥
@crama.oprisor 
Caloian 📅 2023
📍IGP Dealurile Olteniei
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Feteascã Neagrã❗️
👁️ Intense ruby red color with violet reflections❗️
👃 Fruity and spicy nose. Aromas of black fruits, black cherry, cassis, dried prune, dark chocolate, truffle, cinnamon, pepper and leather with smoked notes❗️
👅 Frank attack, fresh and fruity in the mouth. Well-balanced, supple, round, rich, powerful, rich and medium-bodied with velveted tannins on the palate. Flavors of red fruits, black fruits, plum, blackberries, sour-cherries, chocolate, moka and cloves with a touch of spices. Nice finale on red fruits and spices❗️
And there you go, another country full of hidden gems‼️
.
.
#romania #burger #winepairing #feteascaneagra #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ HAPPY EASTER ⚠️❗️
I hope you all had a proper Easter celebration 🐣 
On my end, I just realized that this Sunday was all about the « Clos » 😎 : 
▶️ @champagnepierremignon 
Clos des Graviers 📅2011 - as good as ever❗️
▶️ @clos_des_papes 📅2016 - Pure perfection❗️
Surely a stroke of genius 😂
What about you❓
What gems did you uncork today❓
Make me dream 😁🍷
.
.
#happyeaster #sundaymood #champagne #chateauneufdupape #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ CÔTES DU RHÔNE ⚠️❗️
If I keep drinking heavy hitters like this one, I’m going to end up writing a second book titled ‘My 1000 Slaps’ 😂😂
Pairing of the day : this wonderful white wine from Vallée du Rhône with a roasted chicken and a delicious ratatouille 😋
@closbellane
Cuvée Les Échalas 📅2023
📍AOC Côtes du Rhône Villages Valréas
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Roussanne❗️
👁️ Bright yellow gold color❗️
👃 Powerful and fruity nose. Aromas of stone fruits, ripe yellow fruits, peach, lemon zest, hazelnut, grilled bread, honey and butter with notes of truffle❗️
👅 Rich and fresh in the mouth. Well-structured, ample, fine, persistant, elegant, supple and fat with a great acidity. Flavors of exotic fruits, citrus, stone fruits, pear, apricot, green apple, lemon pie, honey, acacia and white flowers with a saline touch. What a long and intense finale❗️
This one is cray good 🤩‼️
.
.
#valleedurhone #winepairing #cotesdurhone #roussanne #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ HAUT-MÉDOC ⚠️❗️
Do you also open a 2018 and think, ‘Damn, it’s still so young,’ only to realize it’s already 8 years old 🤓? 
I can’t even tell you the mid-life crisis I’m having with a 2014 😂
Tasting of the day : this wonderful discovery during my lunch at @lesconfidences_restaurant 🤩
Chateau de Lamarque 📅2014
📍AOC Haut-Médoc 
Grapes 🍇 : 45% Cabernet Sauvignon, 45% Merlot and 10% Petir Verdot❗️
👁️ Deep and intense purple color with garnet reflections❗️
👃 Complex and rich nose. Aromas of ripe black fruits, blackberries, cassis, prune, leather, licorice, tobacco, roasted nuts, pepper and vanilla with smoked notes❗️
👅 Frank attack, fresh and rich in the mouth. Well-structured, fruity, round, ample, supple, silky, elegant and fine with melted tannins on the palate. Flavors of black fruits, ripe red fruits, dark chocolate, cloves, coffee and grilled bread with spicy notes. Such a long finale on black fruits❗️
Another stunning Bordeaux guys‼️
.
.
#medoc #bordeaux #hautmedoc #wineandfood #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ BANDOL EVERYDAY ⚠️❗️
Can’t get more pragmatic than this 😎
Trip to Champagne cancelled 😅
@alixdinechin had the solution : an improvised tasting with this little surprise to enjoy at home 🍷
The result… A Bandol that absolutely slaps 💥💥
@villamadeleine.vin 📅 2020
📍AOC Bandol
Grapes 🍇 : Mourvèdre, Grenache and Cinsault❗️
👁️ Intense ruby red color with light garnet highlights❗️
👃 Fruity and powerful nose. Aromas of black fruits, black cherry, blueberry, black berry, strawberry, olive tapenade, plum, peony, violet, cinnamon and vanilla with peppery notes❗️
👅 Rich and complex in the mouth. Well-structured, ample, round, silky, powerful, fresh and fruity with melted tannins on the palate. Flavors of ripe red fruits, candiedblack fruits, tapenade, licorice and pepper with a mint touch. Such a long finale on leather and cacao❗️
At this rate, if I keep drinking stuff like this, I’m going to end up moving to Bandol‼️
.
.
#provence #bandol #mourvèdre #cinsault #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ 100% FAILURE ⚠️❗️
A new personal record 😂
.
The other night at @restaurant.babi , I went full « expert mode » and told the owner when it was time to choose the wine 🍷
« Surprise me. Let’s do a blind tasting » 😎
.
The result❓
A total disaster. I missed every single bottle, a perfect strike of wrong answers 😅
My only « win » was the Armenian bubbles… but let’s be real, I’m the one who ordered them 5 minutes before 😂
But honestly❓I didn’t even care, because the food was an absolute knockout 🤩
Tapita / Ultraviolet / Spicy Jack / Rossitruite /  Babka perdu 🤤
When the food is that good, your ego crashing and burning actually tastes pretty sweet 😁
.
Blind tasting is the best reality check, I left with 0 medals, a very humble ego but a happy stomach 🔥
The ultimate paradox : the more I taste, the more I taste different things, the more I fail during blind tastings 😅
Same for you 😁❓
.
Thanks to the Babi team for the vibes and the feast 🔥
.
.
#restaurant #blindtasting #wineandfood #winetime #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ SAINT NICOLAS DE BOURGUEIL ⚠️❗️
700+ posts and still no Saint-Nicolas-de-Bourgueil in my feed. For a guy named Nicolas, it’s almost a sin 😅
Time to make it right 😎
Pairing of the day : this delicious red wine from Touraine with a great piece of pork 🍷
@closdesquarterons
Les Quarterons 📆 2022
📍AOC Saint-Nicolas-de-Bourgueil
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Cabernet Franc❗️
👁️ Deep ruby red color with violet highlights❗️
👃 Fruity and rich nose. Aromas of ripe black fruits, crushed raspberries, wild strawberries, cassis, blueberry, black olive, mushrooms, leather and smoked with spicy notes❗️
👅  Fruity and fruity in the mouth. Well-balanced, elegant, supple, fine, silky, ample and round with melted tannins in the palate. Flavors of ripe red fruits, red currant, prune, black fruits, licorice, peony, acacia and tobacco with a hint of white pepper. Long finale on red fruits❗️
A real crowd-pleaser at a great price‼️
.
.
#loire #touraine #saintnicolasdebourgueil #cabernetfranc #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ COTEAUX CHAMPENOIS ⚠️❗️
Looks like it’s Champagne showers to start off March❗️
From bubbles to white wine still in Champagne 😁
Pairing of the day : this delicious Blanc de Noirs with some Asian food 🤩
@domainealexandrebonnet 
Coteaux Champenois blanc 📆2022
📍Les Riceys
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Pinot Noir❗️
👁️ Bright yellow gold color with partridge eye tint❗️
👃 Fresh and fruity nose. Aromas of yellow fruits, white peach, grapefruit, lemon zest, pear, red berries, elderflower, butter and sweet spices with a hint of flint❗️
👅 Fresh and complex in the mouth. Well-structured, fine, elegant, supple, vinous, lively and ample with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of white fruits, citrus, red currants, green apple, hibiscus, fresh ginger and grilled bread with a saline touch. Such a long and chalky finish❗️
This Coteaux Champenois is absolute class‼️
.
.
#winepairing #blancdenoirs #asianfood#coteauxchampenois #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ SAINT-ESTÈPHE ⚠️❗️
The expression « Bordeaux bashing » just makes me want more Bordeaux 🤤
Call me childish, but you can’t beat this bavette and French fries pairing 🤩
Tasting of the day : this really nice red wine from the first appellation I tasted in my life 🍷
@chateau_laffitte_carcasset 📆2018
📍Saint-Estèphe
Grapes 🍇 : Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and Cabernet Franc❗️
👁️ Deep garnet red color with tuiled reflections❗️
👃 Rich and complex nose. Aromas of ripe black fruits, cassis, blackberry, plum, blueberry, cedar, moka, chocolate, tobacco, leather, licorice and black pepper with notes of violet❗️
👅 Fruity and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, round, powerful, elegant and silky with melted tannins on the palate. Flavors of black fruits, blueberry, blackcurrant, cherry, black olive, cacao, caramel, cinnamon and forest floor with a touch of vanilla. Long finale on spices❗️
A powerhouse bottle that won’t break the bank‼️
.
.
#bordeaux #saintestephe #frenchfries #steak #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ CHAMBOLLE-MUSIGNY ⚠️❗️
Nothing like a stopover in one of the Côte de Nuits’ most prestigious villages to break up the drive from Brussels to Provence 😎
And not just anywhere - at a fantastic hotel right in the heart of the village : @bellevignehotels 🔥
.
Special mention for last night’s dinner where I got to enjoy two heavy hitters 💥 
▶️ The first one : an appellation I love with a bit of age, a 📆 2018 Monthélie from Domaine Potinet-Ampeau paired with snails in parsley sauce, cancoillotte cheese mousse, and onion crumble 🤤
▶️ And the second one : Visiting Chambolle without drinking a Chambolle is like going to Turkey and skipping the hair transplant 😅. So I tried the 📆2022 Chambolle-Musigny from Christian Clerget with an authentic traditional veal blanquette… pure bliss 😍
.
Now you know the spot next time you’re around ‼️
Happy wine Sunday guys 🍷
.
.
#burgundy #cotedenuits #cotedor #routedesgrandscrus #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ SPANISH SPOT ⚠️❗️
Today, we’re not focusing on a single bottle, but on a fantastic new spot that just opened in my neighborhood : @lavinotecaespanola 🇪🇸 
. 
On the menu : simple, delicious Spanish cuisine paired with superb Spanish wines 🍾
Alejandro’s motto « the best quality, or nothing » 🔥
.
We started with pimientos del padrón and scampi fritters with a crisp white from Girona (D.O Empordà). Then, the chorizo a la sidra with a hidden gem from the Aragon region (D.O Cariñena), and finally, the Iberian pluma board paired with a stunning 100% Grenache from Valencia 🍷
And the dessert… a homemade cheesecake that was pure bliss‼️
.
I’ve been wanting to explore more Spanish wines, and this spot couldn’t have opened at a better time 😁
I’m planning to taste my way through the entire list 🤩
.
.
#spanishfood #wine #winepairing #belgium #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ ÎLE-DE-FRANCE ⚠️❗️
Having a vineyard just 25minutes from Paris is the ultimate flex 😎 
(well, depending on where in Paris you’re 😂)
Tasting of the day : this really nice white wine from Versailles Plain 🔥
@la_bouche_du_roi 
Les Louis D’Or 📆2023
📍 IGP Ile-de-France
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Chardonnay❗️
👁️ Bright and pale yellow gold color❗️
👃 Fresh and fruity nose. Aromas of citrus, grapefruit, watermelon, lemon zest, peach, floral and spices with grilled notes❗️
👅 Fresh and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, supple, lively, silky and fine with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of orchard fruits, apricot, ripe apple, pear, citrus, lime, spices, ginger and acacia with a saline touch. Such a nice finale on citrus❗️
And they said we couldn’t make wine in Ile-de-France 😁‼️
.
.
#versailles #winepairing #frenchwine #igp #sipmygrape

❗️⚠️ CÔTES CATALANES ⚠️❗️
Straight out of the wine fair, and still no rest for the brave with this decadent pairing 🤩

@horizon_wines 
Blanc 📆2023
📍IGP Côtes Catalanes

👅 Fresh and complex in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, round, supple, fruity, rich and elegant with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of citrus, lemon cream, quince, stone fruits, almond, dried fruits, vanilla, honey and spices with a saline touch. Such a long finale on dried fruits❗️

❗️⚠️ SALON VINEA ⚠️❗️
100% Gratuit 🆓 
.
Vinea, c’est le salon incontournable des cépages résistants, qui réunit vignerons, pros et amateurs autour d’une viticulture durable et innovante 🤩
.
Depuis 2 ans, il met en lumière des variétés capables de mieux résister aux maladies et au changement climatique, avec des dégustations, échanges et découvertes d’innovations 🔥
.
Un rendez-vous clé pour découvrir l’avenir du vin et soutenir une production respectueuse de l’environnement 👌
.
Ne manquez pas cette belle occasion de rencontrer des passionnés engagés et profitez de 2 conférences durant le salon 👍
Par ici pour s’inscrire - my.weezevent.com/vinea
Venez nombreux 🔥
*collaboration commerciale 
.
🇬🇧 English version
100% Free 🆓 
.
Vinea is the unmissable fair for resistant grape varieties, bringing together winemakers, professionals, and enthusiasts around sustainable and innovative viticulture 🤩
.
For the past two years, it has been highlighting varieties that are more resilient to diseases and climate change through tastings, discussions, and the latest innovations 🔥
.
It’s a key event to discover the future of wine and support environmentally friendly production 👌
.
Don’t miss this great opportunity to meet committed experts plus, there will be 2 conferences to enjoy 👍
The more, the merrier 🔥
.
.

▶️ If you’re not sure what to give for Father’s Day, Mother’s Day, Grandparents’ Day, Secret Santa, a birthday, or even Christmas, this book is the right solution🤓
.
▶️ As you can see, I need all of you to make this project come to life. We are in this together:
BECAUSE IT’S OUR PROJECT‼️
.
PS: And as a sneak peek, I’ve included some excerpts from the book in the post so you can start diving into the world of Serial Quilleurs 🤩
.
I’ve put the link in my bio to access the pre-order page 📕
Cheers to everyone! 🍷🍾
.
.

❗️⚠️ GC SELECTION ⚠️❗️
The Grand Cercle of Bordeaux wines @grandcercle , an association unlike any other 🔥
.
This association, bringing together 125 winegrowers representing 27 Bordeaux appellations, is constantly on the move around the world 🍷
.
It stands out for its dynamism and global influence. It is committed to promoting its members through the organization of numerous tastings in France, Europe, and even further afield 🤩
Here is the program of 2024 : 
https://grandcercle.fr/evenements
.
Here is a sample of prestigious Chateaux, members of this association, that I discovered🍷: 
➡️ Chateau Tour Baladoz 2020 : red fruits, woody notes, spices, fresh, rich and intense with well-integrated tannins
➡️ Chateau de Haut-Coulon 2019 : red and black fruits, blackberries, rich and medium-bodied with elegant tannins
➡️ Chateau Dalem 2019 : black fruits, licorice, dense, silky and round with silky tannins 
➡️ L’Archange 2015 : ripe black fruits, , plum, sweet spices, powerful, supple and fat with silky tannins 
➡️ Chateau Tour de Pressac 2019 : Blackberries, cassis, vanilla, full-bodied, fresh and ample with silky tannins
➡️ Chateau de Laussac 2019 : cherry, plum, woody notes, well-structured and complex with velveted tannins
➡️ Chateau Haut Bacalan 2019 : cherry, raspberries, violet, elegant, fresh and persistent with silky tannins 
.
Now it’s your turn to be amazed by @grandcercle and its Châteaux Talents 🤩
.
« L’abus d’alcool est dangereux pour la santé, à consommer avec modération »
Collaboration commerciale 
.
.

❗️⚠️ BEAUJOLAIS LOVER ⚠️❗️
Today it’s a red crush guys 🍷
It was a long time I didn’t taste a wine from this appellation so I had to fix this mistake 😁
Tasting of the day : a delicious red wine from Fleurie at the restaurant @yesbistrot 🔥
And you, what’s your last Fleurie ⁉️
@yannbertrand_vins 
Cuvée Coup de Foudre 📅2020
📍 Fleurie
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Gamay Noir❗️
👁️ Intense garnet red color❗️
👃 Fruity and gourmet nose. Aromas of  ripe fruits, plum, cherry, strawberry compote, cranberry and blackberry with notes of white pepper❗️
👅 Fresh and complex in the mouth. Well-structured, round, supple and persistant with a great acidity and ripe tannins. Flavors of red fruits, black fruits, blackberry, cranberry, leather, licorice and spices with notes of violet. Long finale❗️
Such a nice Fleurie, I recommend it‼️
.
.

❗️⚠️MAGNUM OF TERREBRUNE⚠️❗️
When you scroll through the bottles you drank last year and come across this crazy magnum with foie gras 😍
You feel so nostalgic about this wonderful trip in South of France with the Vinal 4 : @dalkia_loves_wine @un_blaireau_et_du_vin and @winepoetry_ 🔥
@domainedeterrebrune white 📅2015
📍Bandol
Grapes 🍇 : 50% Clairette, 20% Ugni Blanc, 20% Bourboulenc, 5% Rolle and 5% Marsanne❗️
👁️ Intense golden yellow color❗️
👃 Fruity and powerful nose. Aromas of white fruits, pear, apple, citrus, mirabelle plum, honey and honeysuckle❗️
👅 Fresh and powerful in the mouth. Well-balanced, round and gourmet with a great acidity on the palate. Flavors of white fruits, tropical fruits, ananas, white flowers and white pepper with a saline touch. Refreshing and long finale❗️
Perfect with the foie gras‼️
.
.

After hearing about this superb champagne over and over again, I finally had the pleasure to taste it 🥂
Thank you @mari_on_bd for insisting on this cuvée 😁😁
@charlesheidsieckchampagne 
Blanc des Millénaires 📅2007
📍Reims
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Chardonnay❗️
👁️ Pale gold color with light green reflections❗️

Now I can say it’s delicious 🥂‼️
.

❗️⚠️ WINE BOX GIVEAWAY ⚠️❗️
Autumn has started, harvest is over❗️
.
The winery is in full swing. Grapes are being brought in, destemmed and pressed, alcoholic fermentation begins and needs monitoring. Wines are transferred from one tank to another, they are pumped over and punched down. Red wines are moved to barrels!
Vinification process begins 🔥
.
For Autumn with @vinsvaldeloire , we will give you the chance to win this automn box 😍 :
➡️ Domaine de Brizé Saumur 
➡️ Domaine Lelais Jasnières
➡️ An autumn recipy
➡️ A puzzle 
➡️ A pull-over
➡️ A light garland you can put in an empty bottle
. 
Easy to participate guys 🎁 :
➡️ Like the post 
➡️ Follow @vinsvaldeloire and sipmygrape
➡️ Tag a friend you will share these two bottles with (1 comment, 1 friend)
➡️ Share in story for an extra chance
.
The lucky winner will be announced on this Saturday 🤙
Only for France
. 
Good luck everyone 🍀

@domaine.vecchio 
UVA Antica 📅2021
Bianco Gentile
📍Chiatra

❗️⚠️ CHAMPAGNE SALON ⚠️❗️
There are some wines and champagnes you wish to taste once in your life 😍
During our trip in Champagne we had the chance to drink this stunning one 🥂🥂
@maisonchampagnesalon 
Salon 📅1997
📍 Mesnil sur Oger
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Chardonnay❗️
👁 Beautiful yellow gold color with fine and delicate bubbles❗️
👃 Expressive, very complex and fresh nose. Aromas of citrus, apple, stone fruits, grapefruit, ananas and brioche with floral notes❗️
👅 Rich, complex and gorgeous in the mouth. Perfectly balanced, generous, vinous, silky and delicate on the palate. Flavors of citrus, red fruits, stone fruits, candies orange, honey, grilled bread and hazelnut with notes of white pepper. The finale is soooo long 😍❗️
ONE OF MY GREATEST EMOTIONS🔥‼️
.
.

❗️⚠️ DOMAINE DE TERREBRUNE ⚠️❗️
This week end we were in Provence with the Vinal 4 @dalkia_loves_wine @un_blaireau_et_du_vin and @winepoetry_ 🔥
We had the chance to visit and taste this fantastic domaine 🍇
First time I tasted a rosé so old 😍
@domainedeterrebrune 📅 2001
📍Bandol
Grapes 🍇 : 50% Mourvèdre, 25% Cinsault and 25% Grenache❗️
👁 Beautifull salmon color❗️
👃 Intense and powerful nose. Aromas of yellow peach, grapefruit, citrus, watermelon and red fruits with notes of spices❗️
👅 Fresh and gourmet in the mouth. Well-balanced, ample, supple and fine on the palate. Flavors of raspberries, strawberries, mango, butter and mint with notes of pepper. Such a long and fruity finale❗️
One of the best rosé I ever had 😍‼️
.
.

Last year with my partner in wine @dalkia_loves_wine we had the chance to learn more about Cantenac Brown 👍
.
I would like to thank you the team during this year for his confidence and his hospitality 🙏 
.
As ambassadors it’s such a pleasure to make you discover the estate, the vines, the vineyard and especially their great wines 🥂🍷:
️▶️ Chateau Cantenac-Brown 
▶️ Brio (their second red wine)
▶️ Alto (their white wine)
.
During our latest trip, the Cantenac’s team organizes to us a really interesting tasting between 3 different vintages (2016, 2015 and 2014) in 3 different glasses 🔥
The results were impressive and in each glasses the vintages had different aromas and flavors 🔥🔥
. 
With all we told you on Cantenac Brown you have to go there as soon as possible 👏

❗️⚠️ HUGE CHABLIS ⚠️❗️
I have drunk my first wine from this amazing producer in 2020 and it was wonderful (Butteaux 2009) 🥂
What a pleasure and a chance to taste another really nice cuvée 🔥
Domaine François Raveneau
Chablis Grand Cru Valmur 📅2005
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Chardonnay❗️
👁 Clear gold color❗️
👃 At first discret nose but after some minutes an intense fresh and floral nose. Aromas of citrus, lemon, apple, pear and honey with a stone side❗️
👅 Powerful and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, well-structured, round and fine with a great minerality and acidity on the palate. Flavors of citrus, honey, butter, vanilla, yellow fruits and almond. Such a long and fantastic finale❗️
It was an amazing tasting 😍‼️
.
.

❗️⚠️LUSSAC SAINT-ÉMILION⚠️❗️
Red for meat and White for cheese🔥
Today let’s taste two wines produced by @chateaularoseperriere ‼️
.
▶️ La Rose Perrière 📅2016 red :
Grapes 🍇 : 90% Merlot and 10% Cabernet-Franc❗️
👁 Garnet red color with violet reflections❗️
👃 Gourmet and fruity nose. Aromas of black cherries, plums, blackcurrants, cassis, chocolate, tobacco and pepper with a smoked side❗️
👅 Complex and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, lively and round with silky tannins on the palate. Flavors of black fruits, black chocolate, licorice and leather. Nice and elegant finale❗️
.
▶️ La Rose Perrière 📅2019 white :
Grapes 🍇 : 90% Sauvignon Blanc, 7% Semillon and 3% Muscadelle❗️
👁 Clear yellow gold color❗️
👃 Fresh and rich nose. Aromas of citrus, peach, pear, mango and grapefruit with notes of flint❗️
👅 Elegant and complex in the mouth. Well-structured, fresh and pure with a great acidity. Flavors of yellow fruits, clean stone fruits and citrus. Pleasant and long finale❗️
TWO GREAT DISCOVERIES I RECOMMEND 🔥‼️
.
.

❗️⚠️ OUTSTANDING RIESLING ⚠️❗️
Yesterday with some friends we had the chance to be invited to taste wines produced by the « master of Riesling »🥂
We tasted 18 wines from this fantastic winery🔥
Crush of the tasting : a marvelous  Riesling🥂
@weingut_markusmolitor 
Bernkasteler Doctor Auslese 📅2019
📍Mosel
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Riesling❗️
👁 Intense yellow gold color❗️
👃 Explosive and rich nose. Full of aromas : citrus, grapefruit, pear, grilled almond and spices with mineral, floral and smoky touchs❗️
👅 Complex, fine and rich in the mouth. Well-balanced, well-structured, onctuous, nice acidity and minerality on the palate. Flavors of citrus, grapefruit, pear and spices with floral notes. Wonderful and long finale❗️
The best Riesling I ever had‼️
.
.

👅 Round and elegant in the mouth. Well-structured with a great acidity. Flavors of citrus, stones fruits, yellow fruits with a brioche side. Nice and long finale❗️
It’s an excellent white wine from Bordeaux‼️
DRINK RESPONSIBLY😊
.

❗️⚠️ MARGAUX x MEAT ⚠️❗️
Little reminder 👍: 
The estate @chateau_cantenac_brown was founded by John Lewis Brown, a scottish wine lover, in the early 19th century. Located in the Margaux appellation, this 3rd Grand Cru Classé of 1855 produces three wines 🥂🍷
.
Today let’s taste their first red wine with a great piece of meat 🥩 🔥
Have you ever tasted this Château 😊❓
.
@chateau_cantenac_brown 📅2010
Grand Cru Classé 1855
📍Appellation Margaux
Grapes 🍇 : 66% Cabernet-Sauvignon and 34% Merlot❗️
👁 Deep and dense ruby red color❗️
👃 Powerful and elegant nose. Aromas of red fruits, cassis, plum, blackberries, grilled almond and licorice with notes of coffee and chocolate❗️
👅 Frank attack, powerful and complex on the mouth. Well-structured, fresh and great acidity on the palate with silky tannins. Flavors of cherry, plum, mint and leather with notes of spices. Pleasant and long finale❗️
A really nice wine from Margaux‼️
DRINK RESPONSIBLY 🙏🙏
.
.

Let’s celebrate this nice moment with some japanese food and a great white wine from Corsica 🥂‼️
@yvesleccia 
Cuvée E Croce 📅2019
📍Patrimonio
Grapes 🍇 : 100% Vermentino❗️
👁 Pale and clear yellow color❗️
👃 Fresh and fruity nose. Aromas of citrus, grapefruit, honey and hawthorn with notes of white flowers❗️
👅 Fresh and gourmet in the mouth. Elegant and well-balanced on the palate. Flavors of lemon, pear and yellow peach with a saline touch. Nice and long finale❗️
A very pleasant white one‼️
.
.

Cru Classé

❗️⚠️ AWESOME WHITE CNDP⚠️❗️
Some years ago I discovered this Château during a wedding, their white wine was poured with the starter 🥂
My first sip was « Waouh it’s really delicious »🔥
After tasted it again, it doesn’t change my mind : still gorgeous ‼️

📍 Chateauneuf du Pape

Tasting of the day : a really delicious red wine from Bordeaux🍷❗️
Château Lafleur-Petrus 📅2015
📍Pomerol
Grapes 🍇 : 91% Merlot, 6% Cabernet Franc and 3% Petit Verdot❗️
👁 Intense garnet red color❗️
👃 Expressive and complex nose. Aromas of black fruits, plum, cassis, licorice and black pepper with a present oaky side❗️
👅 Ample, rich and elegant in the mouth. Silky and well-balanced on the palate with fine and ripe tannins. Flavors of tobacco, spices, black fruits and chocolate. Very nice and long finish❗️
Still young but already a tremendous wine🔥❗️ 
.
.

Time to taste one of the most famous Champagnes in the world 🥂🍾🇫🇷‼️
@louisroederer_ 
Champagne Louis Roederer
Cuvée Cristal rosé 📆2006
Grapes 🍇 : 55% Pinot Noir and 45% Chardonnay❗️
👁 Salmon pink hue with bright golden tints. Fine bubbles❗️
👃 Nose of fresh fruit bouquet with the right balance of sweetness and acidity. The Pinot Noir’s concentration and maturity adds distinctive notes of fruit liqueur. Aromas of roasted almonds and gingerbread❗️
👅 Voluptuous attack : intense and amazingly light. A concentrated blend of grit based on chalky freshness and firm. The ensemble is very harmonious. Flavors of white flowers, red fruits, caramel and “tarte Tatin”‼️

After a very nice trip in Canada 🇨🇦, I’m back to share new tastings 🍷‼️
Let’s start with a very famous red wine from Moulis-en-Médoc in Bordeaux 👌🎉🇫🇷‼️
@chateau_chasse_spleen 
Cru Bourgeois 📆 2014
📍Moulis-en-Médoc 💥
Grapes 🍇: 50% Merlot, 45% Cabernet-Sauvignon and 5% Petit-Verdot‼️
For this tasting, let’s use this gadget to test this wine in a new way : @dvinewinestraw 👁 Nice ruby red color❗️
👃 Slightly woody nose. Notes of vanilla and black cherries. Touch of black pepper❗️
👅 Frank attack. Very nice balance in the mouth between the crunchy fruit and the woody side. The tannins are silky. Long and persistant finish❗️
It was very interesting to taste it in 2018. Let’s taste it again in 10 years to smell the difference 😊💥🍇🇫🇷‼️
.

Tasting of the day : another bottle I forgot in my cellar, so let’s taste it 🎉💥‼️
One of the most famous Champagne in the world (one of my favorite) 🥂🍾👌‼️
@champagne_bollinger 
Spécial cuvée non vintage!!!
Grapes 🍇 : 60% Pinot Noir, 25% Chardonnay and 15% Pinot Meunier❗️
For the small story, this bottle existed before 2012. Indeed, Bollinger decided in 2012 to return to the 1846 bottle (the bottle you can see now)!!!
👁Golden yellow color, fine bubbles ❗️
👃Beautiful aromatic complexity. Oxidized nose due to a long conservation but really interesting. Strong notes of stewed apples 🍏 and peaches 🍑 ❗️
👅Very fine bubbles. We find aromas of stewed apples we smelt before. Aromas of brioche and spices. Combination of complexity and liveliness. Long finish in the mouth❗️
The oxidized side is really interesting. Nice pairing with tapenade and toasted bread 🍞 ‼️
.
.
